---
title: "icosphere"
generated: true
description: "Construct an icosphere via recursive subdivision."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.mesh`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:icosphere -->
```python
icosphere(n_iterations: int = 0) -> Mesh
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:icosphere -->
Construct an icosphere via recursive subdivision.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:icosphere -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `n_iterations` | `int` | — | `0` | Subdivision count. `0` gives 12 vertices (base icosahedron). `n` gives $10 \cdot 4^{n} + 2$ vertices: `n=1` -> 42, `n=2` -> 162, ..., `n=7` -> 163842 (matches FreeSurfer's `ico7`). |

**Returns** `Mesh`. A [`Mesh`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh/Mesh.qmd) with unit-sphere vertices and oriented faces.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
